creator: rw@chekker.net
text:
hai,

  we just wanted to upgrade our as20 from true64:) to freeBSD4.4
  i'm getting a very similar error when booting the install-iso.
  sym1 reports this scsii bus reset on and on ...

  in hardware.txt i could read:

 >>  Don't try to use Symbios-chip based SCSI adapters in the PCI slots
   connected to hose 1. There is a not-yet-found FreeBSD bug that prevents
   this from working correctly. DS20 ships by default with a Symbios on hose
   1 so you have to move this card before you can install/boot FreeBSD on it.
 <<

   we then moved the card from pci1slot0 (hose1) to pci0slot2 (hose0) and
   pci0slot0 (hose0) ... without success.

   has anybody found a solution for this problem?
   
gruessen,
 robert                          mailto:rw@chekker.net
